title: Implement podman-remote umount and rm command
body:
* refactor command output to use one function
* Add new worker pool parallel operations
* Implement podman-remote umount
* Refactored podman wait to use printCmdOutput()

Carries commits from https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2549

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: address @mheon comments and test failures and LGTM! well done
